targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0) / ${fire_target} * 100, 1) as value
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0) / ${fire_target} * 100, 1) as value

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN avg_monthly_savings > 0 THEN CAST(ROUND((${fire_target} - current_value) / avg_monthly_savings, 0) AS INTEGER) ELSE -1 END as value FROM (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0) as current_value, COALESCE((SELECT AVG(savings) FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)), 0) as avg_monthly_savings)
targets.queryText: SELECT CASE WHEN avg_monthly_savings > 0 THEN CAST(ROUND((${fire_target} - current_value) / avg_monthly_savings, 0) AS INTEGER) ELSE -1 END as value FROM (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0) as current_value, COALESCE((SELECT AVG(savings) FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)), 0) as avg_monthly_savings)

targets.rawQueryText: WITH params AS (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0) as current_value, COALESCE((SELECT AVG(savings) FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)), 0) as avg_monthly_savings), sim(month_n, portfolio) AS (SELECT 0, current_value FROM params UNION ALL SELECT month_n + 1, portfolio * (1 + ${annual_return}/100.0/12) + (SELECT avg_monthly_savings FROM params) FROM sim WHERE month_n < 600 AND portfolio < ${fire_target}) SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT current_value FROM params) >= ${fire_target} THEN 0 ELSE MAX(month_n) END as value FROM sim
targets.queryText: WITH params AS (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0) as current_value, COALESCE((SELECT AVG(savings) FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)), 0) as avg_monthly_savings), sim(month_n, portfolio) AS (SELECT 0, current_value FROM params UNION ALL SELECT month_n + 1, portfolio * (1 + ${annual_return}/100.0/12) + (SELECT avg_monthly_savings FROM params) FROM sim WHERE month_n < 600 AND portfolio < ${fire_target}) SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT current_value FROM params) >= ${fire_target} THEN 0 ELSE MAX(month_n) END as value FROM sim

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT 'Current Portfolio' as scenario, ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0), 0) as value UNION ALL SELECT 'Target (FIRE)', ${fire_target} UNION ALL SELECT 'Remaining', ${fire_target} - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0) UNION ALL SELECT 'Avg Monthly Savings', ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT AVG(savings) FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)), 0), 0)
targets.queryText: SELECT 'Current Portfolio' as scenario, ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0), 0) as value UNION ALL SELECT 'Target (FIRE)', ${fire_target} UNION ALL SELECT 'Remaining', ${fire_target} - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0) UNION ALL SELECT 'Avg Monthly Savings', ROUND(COALESCE((SELECT AVG(savings) FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)), 0), 0)

targets.rawQueryText: WITH params AS (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0) as current_value, COALESCE((SELECT AVG(savings) FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)), 0) as avg_monthly_savings), sim(month_n, portfolio) AS (SELECT 0, current_value FROM params UNION ALL SELECT month_n + 1, portfolio * (1 + ${annual_return}/100.0/12) + (SELECT avg_monthly_savings FROM params) FROM sim WHERE month_n < 600 AND portfolio < ${fire_target}), milestones(milestone, target_value) AS (SELECT '25%', ${fire_target} * 0.25 UNION ALL SELECT '50%', ${fire_target} * 0.50 UNION ALL SELECT '75%', ${fire_target} * 0.75 UNION ALL SELECT '100%', CAST(${fire_target} AS REAL)) SELECT m.milestone, ROUND(m.target_value, 0) as target_pln, CASE WHEN (SELECT current_value FROM params) >= m.target_value THEN 'Reached!' ELSE COALESCE((SELECT date(date('now'), '+' || MIN(s.month_n) || ' months') FROM sim s WHERE s.portfolio >= m.target_value), 'N/A') END as estimated_date FROM milestones m
targets.queryText: WITH params AS (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.quantity * COALESCE(ap.price_base, 0)) FROM holdings h LEFT JOIN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, price_base FROM asset_prices WHERE (asset_type, symbol, date) IN (SELECT asset_type, symbol, MAX(date) FROM asset_prices GROUP BY asset_type, symbol)) ap ON h.asset_type = ap.asset_type AND h.symbol = ap.symbol), 0) as current_value, COALESCE((SELECT AVG(savings) FROM (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as m, SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='income' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN tx_type='expense' THEN COALESCE(amount_base,amount) ELSE 0 END) as savings FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND tx_type IN ('income','expense') GROUP BY m)), 0) as avg_monthly_savings), sim(month_n, portfolio) AS (SELECT 0, current_value FROM params UNION ALL SELECT month_n + 1, portfolio * (1 + ${annual_return}/100.0/12) + (SELECT avg_monthly_savings FROM params) FROM sim WHERE month_n < 600 AND portfolio < ${fire_target}), milestones(milestone, target_value) AS (SELECT '25%', ${fire_target} * 0.25 UNION ALL SELECT '50%', ${fire_target} * 0.50 UNION ALL SELECT '75%', ${fire_target} * 0.75 UNION ALL SELECT '100%', CAST(${fire_target} AS REAL)) SELECT m.milestone, ROUND(m.target_value, 0) as target_pln, CASE WHEN (SELECT current_value FROM params) >= m.target_value THEN 'Reached!' ELSE COALESCE((SELECT date(date('now'), '+' || MIN(s.month_n) || ' months') FROM sim s WHERE s.portfolio >= m.target_value), 'N/A') END as estimated_date FROM milestones m

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', month || '-07') AS INTEGER) as time, net_worth_base as net_worth, ${fire_target} as fire_target FROM monthly_summaries ORDER BY month
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', month || '-07') AS INTEGER) as time, net_worth_base as net_worth, ${fire_target} as fire_target FROM monthly_summaries ORDER BY month
